{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord Countermeasures
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|There are multiple [[Underlord Countermeasures]], including Numbers Two through Four.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|There are sixteen [[Underlord Countermeasures]] in total.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
